allow: Bash(node -e "try { require\('@element-plus/icons-vue'\); console.log\('OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('NOT FOUND'\); }")
Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({ep: pkg.dependencies['element-plus'], vue: pkg.dependencies.vue}, null, 2\)\)")

PowerShell($tmpFile = "test_upload.txt"; "hello test" | Out-File -FilePath $tmpFile -Encoding utf8; $response = curl.exe -s -w "`n%{http_code}" -X POST "http://159.75.169.224:1235/api/file/upload" -F "file=@$tmpFile;type=text/plain" -F "businessType=ARTICLE" -F "businessId=test123" -F "businessField=cover"; Write-Output $response; Remove-Item $tmpFile -Force)

PowerShell($headers = @{"Content-Type"="application/json"}; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://159.75.169.224:1235/api/knowledge/article/page?current=1&size=2" -Method Get -Headers $headers -TimeoutSec 10; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4 } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(try { $r1 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://159.75.169.224:1235/api/knowledge/article/page?current=1&size=2" -Method Get -Headers @{"Content-Type"="application/json"} -TimeoutSec 10; $r2 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://159.75.169.224:1235/api/knowledge/article/page?current=2&size=2" -Method Get -Headers @{"Content-Type"="application/json"} -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "Page1: records=$\($r1.data.records.Count\), current=$\($r1.data.current\)"; Write-Output "Page2: records=$\($r2.data.records.Count\), current=$\($r2.data.current\)"; Write-Output "Records same? $\(if \($r1.data.records[0].id -eq $r2.data.records[0].id\) {'YES'} else {'NO'}\)" } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== current=1 size=1 ==="; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://159.75.169.224:1235/api/knowledge/article/page?current=1&size=1" -Method Get -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "records: $\($r.data.records.Count\), ids: $\($r.data.records[0].id\)" } catch { $_.Exception.Message }; Write-Output "=== current=2 size=1 ==="; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://159.75.169.224:1235/api/knowledge/article/page?current=2&size=1" -Method Get -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "records: $\($r.data.records.Count\), ids: $\($r.data.records[0].id\)" } catch { $_.Exception.Message }; Write-Output "=== current=3 size=1 ==="; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://159.75.169.224:1235/api/knowledge/article/page?current=3&size=1" -Method Get -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "records: $\($r.data.records.Count\), ids: $\($r.data.records[0].id\)" } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== page=2 size=1 ==="; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://159.75.169.224:1235/api/knowledge/article/page?page=2&size=1" -Method Get -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "records: $\($r.data.records.Count\), ids: $\($r.data.records[0].id\), current=$\($r.data.current\)" } catch { $_.Exception.Message }; Write-Output "=== pageNum=2 size=1 ==="; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://159.75.169.224:1235/api/knowledge/article/page?pageNum=2&size=1" -Method Get -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "records: $\($r.data.records.Count\), ids: $\($r.data.records[0].id\)" } catch { $_.Exception.Message })
